sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me click the blue target to swap the blue bar and diamond pattern
# Blue target is at around row 36, col 48

print("=== Clicking blue target ===")
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 48}])

# Check the result
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")

# Check the left side after clicking
lines_after = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== After clicking blue target ===")
for r in range(16, 45):
    row_str = lines_after[r][0:32]
    if any(c not in 'cG' for c in row_str):
        print(f"Row {r}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
